description_long: This is a single-rider bicycle with a classic diamond frame, featuring two large spoked wheels and a standard saddle seat. The handlebars are wide and slightly curved, providing a comfortable upright riding position. The pedals are positioned on either side of the crankset, and the chain is partially enclosed by a circular guard. The front and rear wheels are connected by a sturdy metal frame, and the seat is mounted on a straight seat post. There are no visible baskets, racks, or additional accessories attached to the frame. The overall appearance is utilitarian and streamlined, suitable for urban commuting or recreational riding.
description: A classic diamond-frame bicycle with wide curved handlebars, two spoked wheels, and a standard saddle seat. The design is simple and functional, ideal for city use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved handlebars, front wheel, and the alignment of the pedals.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full frame geometry, spoked wheels, seat, and pedal arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back wheel, seat post, and the symmetry of the frame and pedals.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the chain guard, crankset, and the overall frame structure.
